activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The first train ___ at 05.45. (leave)
activities.explanation: Un horario de tren se expresa con presente simple; «train» es singular, por eso usamos «leaves».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The doors ___ at seven tomorrow evening. (open)
activities.explanation: La apertura forma parte del programa; con el sujeto plural «doors» usamos «open».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: Our flight ___ in Lisbon at 14.20. (land)
activities.explanation: La llegada figura en el horario del vuelo; «flight» exige la tercera persona «lands».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The film ___ at quarter past eight. (start)
activities.explanation: La hora de una película programada se expresa con presente simple: «starts».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: Classes ___ again on 8 September. (begin)
activities.explanation: El calendario académico establece la fecha; el sujeto plural «classes» lleva «begin».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: What time ___ the coach arrive in Bristol? (do)
activities.explanation: Para preguntar por el horario con sujeto singular usamos «does» seguido de «arrive».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The museum ___ at six on weekdays. (close)
activities.explanation: Es un horario habitual y futuro a la vez; «museum» es singular y requiere «closes».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The conference programme ___ two short breaks. (include)
activities.explanation: El programa es un documento fijado; el singular «programme» se combina con «includes».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The buses ___ every twenty minutes on Sundays. (run)
activities.explanation: La frecuencia del servicio pertenece al horario; el sujeto plural lleva «run».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The final presentation ___ place after lunch. (take)
activities.explanation: «Take place» describe un evento programado; con sujeto singular usamos «takes».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The exhibition ___ until the end of October. (continue)
activities.explanation: La duración está fijada por el calendario de la exposición; corresponde «continues».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: Registration ___ at midnight on 30 June. (end)
activities.explanation: La fecha límite forma parte de las condiciones oficiales; usamos presente simple «ends».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The return ferry ___ from pier four, not pier two. (depart)
activities.explanation: El muelle de salida es información del servicio programado; «ferry» lleva «departs».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: According to the itinerary, lunch ___ the walking tour. (follow)
activities.explanation: El itinerario fija el orden de eventos; el sujeto singular «lunch» requiere «follows».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The local market ___ place on the first Saturday of each month. (take)
activities.explanation: La periodicidad está establecida; la expresión correcta es «takes place».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The connecting service ___ passengers twelve minutes to change platforms. (give)
activities.explanation: Se describe una característica fija del horario; «service» es singular y lleva «gives».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The morning session ___ of three practical demonstrations. (consist)
activities.explanation: El contenido de la sesión está fijado en el programa; usamos «consists».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The revised timetable ___ into effect next Monday. (come)
activities.explanation: La entrada en vigor está programada; la expresión es «comes into effect».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The guided tour ___ ninety minutes, including the rooftop visit. (last)
activities.explanation: La duración oficial del tour se expresa con presente simple «lasts».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The final deadline ___ on a public holiday this year. (fall)
activities.explanation: La fecha está determinada por el calendario; «deadline» es singular y requiere «falls».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The express service ___ at Reading but not at the smaller stations. (stop)
activities.explanation: Las paradas pertenecen al horario del servicio; el singular «service» lleva «stops».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The ceremony ___ with a short speech from the mayor. (conclude)
activities.explanation: El cierre está establecido en el programa; «ceremony» requiere «concludes».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The timetable ___ enough time for a short lunch between sessions. (allow)
activities.explanation: Se describe el efecto del horario ya fijado; el singular «timetable» se combina con «allows».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The second half of the course ___ mainly on interview practice. (focus)
activities.explanation: El contenido del curso está programado; la tercera persona correcta es «focuses».

activities.instructions: Complete the scheduled event with the correct present simple form.
activities.prompt: The replacement bus ___ all passengers directly to the city centre. (carry)
activities.explanation: La ruta del servicio sustitutorio está fijada; «carry» cambia a «carries» en tercera persona.
